dropzone.routeHint: Files will be auto-routed to the correct directory and synced to Git

claudeConfig.emptyHint: Click 'Sync to Git' to sync config

privacy.title: Clipboard Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Before enabling clipboard capture
privacy.point1: All captured content is stored locally in your ~/.gitmemo/ Git repository
privacy.point2: Content shorter than 20 characters is automatically ignored
privacy.point3: Common API keys and tokens are auto-filtered (sk-*, ghp_*, etc.)
privacy.point4: You can pause capture anytime from the tray menu or this page

onboarding.title: Get Started with GitMemo
onboarding.installDoneDesc: GitMemo is set up and ready to use
onboarding.writeNoteDesc: Try a quick scratch note or daily journal entry
onboarding.enableClipboardDesc: Auto-save copied text (20+ chars) to Git
onboarding.connectRemoteDesc: Sync your knowledge to GitHub/GitLab for backup
onboarding.configureEditorDesc: Auto-save AI conversations from Claude Code or Cursor

setup.storageDesc: Choose where to store your knowledge
setup.localModeDesc: Store everything on this device. You can add Git remote later.
setup.remoteModeDesc: Push to GitHub/GitLab for backup and multi-device access.
setup.gitUrlHint: SSH URL recommended. You can change this later in Settings.
setup.editorsDesc: Select editors to auto-save AI conversations. You can change this later.
setup.cursorDesc: Auto-save conversations via Cursor rules + MCP
setup.skipEditorsHint: No editor selected — you can enable integrations later in Settings
setup.pleaseWait: Creating directories, initializing Git, configuring integrations...
setup.completeDesc: GitMemo is ready. Start capturing your knowledge.
setup.sshKeyHint: Add this key to your Git hosting provider's Deploy Keys (with write access).
